title: Expand original assessment content and simulation formats

acceptance_criteria.text: Add a multi-select ("choose TWO/THREE") MCQ format end-to-end: Question.answer accepts number | number[], graded all-or-nothing via a central gradeMcq, rendered as toggleable checkboxes with a "Select N" hint in both Practice and Mock views, and accepted by the content validators.
evidence: src/logic.ts: gradeMcq + isMultiSelect; scoreMock uses gradeMcq
src/App.tsx: shared MCQ helpers; Practice + Mock render role=checkbox with .mcq-hint
src/content/validate.ts + scripts/validate-content.mjs: validateMcqAnswer enforces >=2 distinct in-range indices that don't cover every option

acceptance_criteria.text: Author seed multi-select questions (>=3 per track) across A+, Network+, and Security+, mapped to existing objectives, and confirm the full content bank still validates.
evidence: 4 multi-select questions appended per track (aplus-q387..390, netplus-q176..179, secplus-q194..197)
npm run validate:content -> Content valid: 764 questions across 3 certifications

acceptance_criteria.text: Cover the new grading paths with unit tests and keep the build, content, and accessibility checks green.
evidence: src/logic.test.ts: MCQ grading (single + multi-select) and a multi-select scoreMock case
npm test -> 65 passed; npm run build -> ok; npm run validate:a11y -> passed
Browser verification: Mock-exam multi-select renders checkboxes, hint, and holds 2 simultaneous selections with no console errors

acceptance_criteria.text: Additional simulation formats beyond multi-select MCQ (e.g. categorization, fill-in/CLI, hotspot) and bulk multi-select authoring beyond the seed set are deferred to a follow-up.
evidence: Scope decision (2026-06-20): deliver multi-select MCQ + seed content this item; other formats and bulk authoring tracked separately.
